change_summary: Rebranded the product from Municipality Decision Atlas to Nestlyzer.com.
Added the Nestlyzer logo and favicon assets from the supplied logo image.
Updated header, metadata, advertising disclosure, footer brand line and deployment files.
Prepared a GitHub Pages-ready static package with root index.html, CNAME, assets and documentation.
Prepared a separate project recovery package with master context, bootstrap prompt, recovery instructions and PDF report.
current_status: Static, GitHub-deployable prototype. Switzerland remains the deepest official-data module. Europe is available through municipality-level LAU records with visible country-depth status.
open_issues: Country-grade data packs outside Switzerland still need official tax, school, safety, housing, health and local service joins.
Public photos, coats of arms and authority contact enrichment depend on runtime public endpoints unless cached.
The selected-place booklet uses browser print-to-PDF in the static GitHub version.
Legal, privacy, advertising and consumer-disclosure pages need professional review before commercial launch.
next_recommended_actions: Deploy v66 to GitHub Pages under nestlyzer.com.
Test the deployed app in Chrome, Edge and Safari with Switzerland, Germany and France scopes.
Build an audited local-authority contact cache.
Build certified country data packs for Germany and Austria first.
Add country-specific tax modules before making tax-sensitive ranking claims outside Switzerland.
